seo.title: Luxury Interior Design | Saverys of Broadway — Cotswolds & Ludlow
seo.description: Saverys of Broadway creates luxurious, timeless interiors for private residences and luxury hotels. Hand upholstery workshop, premium fabrics showroom, and expert design service. Established 1991. Studios in Broadway, Ludlow and Chelsea.

hero.heading: Rooms composed with care
hero.subtitle: A luxury interior design studio rooted in the Cotswolds, crafting considered spaces since 1991.

studioIntro.heading: A studio of quiet intention
studioIntro.body: At Savery's, we believe the most beautiful rooms are those that feel as though they have always existed. Our approach is one of restraint and consideration — where every fabric, finish and form is chosen not for trend, but for truth.

items.title: Full interior design
items.description: Complete room and property schemes, from concept through to final styling.

items.title: Fabric and material sourcing
items.description: Access to the finest mills and makers — linens, wools, silks and beyond.

items.title: Furniture curation
items.description: Handpicked antiques and contemporary pieces, chosen for character and quality.
